name: slider
description: A token-styled native <input type=range>. Carries the slider role, aria-valuemin/max/now and keyboard navigation for free; POSTs the numeric value, binds via l:model. Server-first replacement for the Lit island.
docs: Copies the slider partial to your JTE root at lievit/slider.jte, reached as @template.lievit.slider(name=...). The native range input POSTs its numeric value under `name` (zero JS); bind to a wire field with `model`. The source is yours: edit freely.
